'''鈭歡-y-v-ch''' ('''kagayvechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rummage|rummage]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-y-v-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rummage|rummage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-y-v-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kagayvechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigayvechoko|thigayvechoko]] || [[word:jigayvechoko|jigayvechoko]] || [[word:shigayvechoko|shigayvechoko]] || [[word:kigayvechoko|kigayvechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugayvechoko|thuthugayvechoko]] || [[word:jujugayvechoko|jujugayvechoko]] || [[word:shushugayvechoko|shushugayvechoko]] || [[word:kukugayvechoko|kukugayvechoko]]
|-

|-
